# GitHub repository “About” settings

Copy these into your repo on GitHub: **Settings** is not required — use the **About** pencil icon on the main repo page (top right, next to Watch / Fork).

| Field | Value |
|-------|--------|
| **Description** | Bilingual healthcare navigation for Pakistan — AI symptom checker, 7,000+ doctor directory, OSM facilities, WHO health statistics. React, Supabase, Claude. |
| **Website** | `https://health-pilot-ai-three.vercel.app/` |
| **Topics** | `healthcare` `pakistan` `react` `typescript` `supabase` `vite` `anthropic` `postgis` `openstreetmap` `ai` `full-stack` `portfolio` |

After saving, the repo homepage will show the live link and topics under **About**.
